conflicts_to_avoid: Do not co-route with high-contrast combat/fight-gym anchors (emberforge, iron_circuit, holland_dirt) — opposite palette and emotional register.
Do not co-route with warm light editorial service packs (verdant_line, copperbeam, velvet_fig, aurelia_medspa) — those are warm/light, this is cool/dark.
Do not pull this pack for B2B SaaS dashboards or admin UIs — it is a consumer physical-product broadcast surface.
When the request is live commerce but the product is not cooling/comfort, keep the structure + atoms but treat the schematic and ice-blue palette as replaceable, not authoritative.
recommended_weight_notes: Strong anchor for live-commerce + product-education requests, especially physical-product demos with a 'watch it live' or shoppable-video framing. Boost weight when the prompt names TikTok Shop / YouTube Live / Shopify Live, schematic/airflow/explainer visuals, or honest offer comparison. Down-weight (or fall back to a neutral modern-website anchor) for warm/light service businesses, dark combat/industrial brands, and SaaS dashboards. This pack is the canonical donor for the eight live-commerce atoms; prefer it over generic ecommerce packs when proof-safe, claim-free commerce copy is required.
